cit.basis: 27% First Category Tax (Impuesto de Primera Categoría) under the semi-integrated regime, Art. 14A Ley sobre Impuesto a la Renta (LIR).
cit.pro_pyme_note: Pro Pyme SME regime (Art. 14D LIR) taxed at 25%. Reform proposals contemplate a transitory 12.5% rate for 2025-2027; this estimator uses the statutory 25%.

shareholder_credit.note: Semi-integrated regime: final shareholders may credit 65% of the First Category Tax against their final taxes (Global Complementario / Adicional).

cit.note: Administered by the Servicio de Impuestos Internos (SII).

vat.note: IVA (Impuesto al Valor Agregado) at a 19% standard rate, DL 825.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Pro Pyme eligibility thresholds (UF-based revenue caps), monthly PPM prepayments, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official SII guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
